subcodes.first_line: O beloved and kind Pure One of God, from boundless grace Thou didst bestow faith and certitude, and the gates [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دلبر مهربان پاک یزدان من از فضل بی پایان ایمان و ایقان بخشیدی و ابواب
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for protection, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love of God
